case_title: DE TELLEZ, MARGARITA ROMERO VS POSITIVE RETURN INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,588.11 FILED BY DE TELLEZ, MARGARITA ROMERO AS TO DEFENDANT POSITIVE RETURN INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-26-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CERT MAIL TO CT CORP SYSTEM AGENT FOR SERVICE POSITIVE RETURN INC. RETURNED TO COURT SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE TELLEZ, MARGARITA ROMERO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POSITIVE RETURN INC. $4,588.10 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,620.10 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT POSITIVE RETURN INC.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $550.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED AS TO DEFENDANT POSITIVE RETURN INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $4,116.01 AS TO DEFENDANT POSITIVE RETURN INC.
